mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT024#SQL002 */ M_F_H_UPPER1 as salesCommLimit1, M_F_H_UPPER2 as salesCommLimit2, M_F_H_UPPER3 as salesCommLimit3, M_F_H_UPPER4 as salesCommLimit4, M_F_H_UPPER5 as salesCommLimit5, M_F_H_UPPER6 as salesCommLimit6, M_F_H_UPPER7 as salesCommLimit7, M_F_H_RITSU1 as salesCommRate1, M_F_H_RITSU2 as salesCommRate2, M_F_H_RITSU3 as salesCommRate3, M_F_H_RITSU4 as salesCommRate4, M_F_H_RITSU5 as salesCommRate5, M_F_H_RITSU6 as salesCommRate6, M_F_H_RITSU7 as salesCommRate7, M_F_K_RITSU1 as cancelCommRate1, M_F_H_UPPER_TOKU1 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral1, M_F_H_UPPER_TOKU2 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral2, M_F_H_UPPER_TOKU3 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral3, M_F_H_UPPER_TOKU4 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral4, M_F_H_UPPER_TOKU5 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral5, M_F_H_UPPER_TOKU6 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral6, M_F_H_UPPER_TOKU7 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral7, M_F_H_RITSU_TOKU1 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral1, M_F_H_RITSU_TOKU2 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral2, M_F_H_RITSU_TOKU3 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral3, M_F_H_RITSU_TOKU4 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral4, M_F_H_RITSU_TOKU5 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral5, M_F_H_RITSU_TOKU6 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral6, M_F_H_RITSU_TOKU7 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral7, M_F_K_RITSU_TOKU1 as cancelCommRateSpecificGeneral1, M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU1 as salesCommLimitSeichou1, M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU2 as salesCommLimitSeichou2, M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU3 as salesCommLimitSeichou3, M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU4 as salesCommLimitSeichou4, M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU5 as salesCommLimitSeichou5, M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU6 as salesCommLimitSeichou6, M_F_H_UPPER_SEICHOU7 as salesCommLimitSeichou7, M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU1 as salesCommRateSeichou1, M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU2 as salesCommRateSeichou2, M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU3 as salesCommRateSeichou3, M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU4 as salesCommRateSeichou4, M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU5 as salesCommRateSeichou5, M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU6 as salesCommRateSeichou6, M_F_H_RITSU_SEICHOU7 as salesCommRateSeichou7, M_F_K_RITSU_SEICHOU1 as cancelCommRateSeichou1, M_F_K_RITSU_KEIZOKU1 as cancelCommRateKeizoku1, M_F_K_RITSU_ISA1 as cancelCommRateIsa1, M_F_K_RITSU_JNISA1 as cancelCommRateJrNisa1, M_F_H_TANIKUCHI as salesCommTanikuchi, YUGU_RITU_BUNBO as transfersPreferentialRateDenominator, YUGU_RITU_BUNSI as transfersPreferentialRateNumerator, YUGU_RITU_BUNBO_TOKU as transfersPreferentialRateDenominatorToku, YUGU_RITU_BUNSI_TOKU as transfersPreferentialRateNumeratorToku, M_F_TYPE as fundType, M_F_CODE as kyoukaiCd FROM FUND WHERE M_F_TYPE in ('1','2') AND M_F_DELFLG = '0' AND M_F_ET_START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND M_F_NRICODE IN
#{sql002Req.nriCd} || ' '
('')

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT024#SQL003 */ FCM_UPPER1 as salesCommLimit1, FCM_UPPER2 as salesCommLimit2, FCM_UPPER3 as salesCommLimit3, FCM_UPPER4 as salesCommLimit4, FCM_UPPER5 as salesCommLimit5, FCM_UPPER6 as salesCommLimit6, FCM_UPPER7 as salesCommLimit7, FCM_RITSU1 as salesCommRate1, FCM_RITSU2 as salesCommRate2, FCM_RITSU3 as salesCommRate3, FCM_RITSU4 as salesCommRate4, FCM_RITSU5 as salesCommRate5, FCM_RITSU6 as salesCommRate6, FCM_RITSU7 as salesCommRate7, FCM_K_RITSU1 as cancelCommRate1, FCM_H_UPPER_TOKU1 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral1, FCM_H_UPPER_TOKU2 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral2, FCM_H_UPPER_TOKU3 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral3, FCM_H_UPPER_TOKU4 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral4, FCM_H_UPPER_TOKU5 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral5, FCM_H_UPPER_TOKU6 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral6, FCM_H_UPPER_TOKU7 as salesCommLimitSpecificGeneral7, FCM_H_RITSU_TOKU1 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral1, FCM_H_RITSU_TOKU2 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral2, FCM_H_RITSU_TOKU3 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral3, FCM_H_RITSU_TOKU4 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral4, FCM_H_RITSU_TOKU5 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral5, FCM_H_RITSU_TOKU6 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral6, FCM_H_RITSU_TOKU7 as salesCommRateSpecificGeneral7, FCM_K_RITSU_TOKU1 as cancelCommRateSpecificGeneral1, FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU1 as salesCommLimitSeichou1, FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU2 as salesCommLimitSeichou2, FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU3 as salesCommLimitSeichou3, FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU4 as salesCommLimitSeichou4, FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU5 as salesCommLimitSeichou5, FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU6 as salesCommLimitSeichou6, FCM_H_UPPER_SEICHOU7 as salesCommLimitSeichou7, FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU1 as salesCommRateSeichou1, FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU2 as salesCommRateSeichou2, FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU3 as salesCommRateSeichou3, FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU4 as salesCommRateSeichou4, FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU5 as salesCommRateSeichou5, FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU6 as salesCommRateSeichou6, FCM_H_RITSU_SEICHOU7 as salesCommRateSeichou7, FCM_K_RITSU_SEICHOU1 as cancelCommRateSeichou1, FCM_K_RITSU_KEIZOKU1 as cancelCommRateKeizoku1, FCM_K_RITSU_ISA1 as cancelCommRateIsa1, FCM_K_RITSU_JNISA1 as cancelCommRateJrNisa1
FROM FUND_COMMISSION_MST A WHERE A.FCM_DEALER_NUMBER = ( SELECT B.FCG_CHANEL_ID FROM FUND_COMIS_GROUP B WHERE B.FCG_COMIS_CODE = #{sql003Req.dealerNumber} ) AND A.FCM_TYPE = #{sql003Req.fundType} AND A.FCM_CODE = #{sql003Req.kyoukaiCd}
